title: Understanding Momentum
text: Momentum is the product of mass and velocity. To find the momentum of an object, multiply its mass by its velocity.

title: Calculate the Momentum of the Box
text: Use the formula for momentum: momentum $$=$$ mass * velocity. What is the momentum of the box?

title: Mass and Velocity of the Box
text: The mass of the box is $$5$$ kg and the velocity of the skater (and thus the box) is $$5$$ $$\frac{m}{s}$$. Use these values to calculate the momentum.

title: Final Calculation
text: Multiply the mass of the box (5 kg) by the velocity (5 m/s) to find the momentum.
